based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/external/pytorch.softmax-ce.batched.golden.jsonl. v0.9 batched observer-mode adversarial plate — each fixture surfaces a distinct batched attack class with a deterministic mutation.

mutation.note: Per-sample forward + per-sample loss are unchanged (engine can recompute them from per_sample[*].inputs and they match). The reduced gradient at updates[0].gradient is mutated. Engine recompute via runBatchedGeneralStep produces a different reduced gradient — Rule 14 fires on the differential. This fixture proves the v0.6 doctrine "existing rules generalize without changes" holds for batched receipts: Rule 14 catches batched gradient mistakes without modification.

reconciliation_check_targeted_first: Rule 14: Engine-recompute differential — reduced gradient claim does not match engine-recomputed reduced gradient.
purpose: v0.9 batched observer-mode anti-circularity fixture. Pressure-tests that the named rule fires BEFORE the reconciler consults fixture_status metadata.
v0_9_note: v0.9 ships batched SGD softmax+CE observer-mode ingestion. Rule 18 (batch reduction consistency) and Rule 19 (sample-set coherence) are new gated rules. Adam / AdamW / momentum and per-sample gradients deferred to v0.9.x.
